feedback.text: I'm very concerned about the fact that Visa and Mastercard are being influenced by an Australian group (Collective Shout) to hinder it's users from purchasing what they deem as 'unsavory'. As legal adults we should be able to make our own decisions on what we buy and not any outside influences. What also concerns me is the UK requiring a facial scan and full picture of a person's ID to access NSFW content. Which does not only include drawn sexual acts but also opinions that go against what the government is doing. It's a huge risk of internet safety and goes against our right of privacy, this act does not protect anyone, it only controls us.
